MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-13-2002 Continued To Jun-17-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-25-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Barry Zoller, Esq. 213/680-5143 for x-defts & moving parties Banning, Micklow, Bull & Lopez LLP, Booth & Banning, Edward Bull III, Kurt Micklow, and Forrest Booth; Sanford M. Cipinko, Esq. 348-1900 for defts/x-complainants & opposing parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as to the fraud allegations (in paragraph 54, motion for summary adjudication granted) and granted as to purchase claims but denied as to all other claims of representation with respect to insurance coverage and negligence and handling the Stevedoring claim. Deft to prepare order.
